name: github-profile
description: ```aura width=860 height=260 link="https://github.com/islam890" <div style={{ display: 'flex', width: '100%', height: '100%', fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', background: '#08080C', borderRadius: 18, padding: 32, border: '1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.25)' }}>   <svg width="860" height="260" style={{ position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0 }}>     <defs>       <radialGradient id="g1"><stop offset="0%" stopColor="rgba(249,115,22,0.75)" /><stop offset="70%" stopColor="rgba(249,115,22,0)" /></radialGradient>       <radialGradient id="g2"><stop offset="0%" stopColor="rgba(255,122,0,0.55)" /><stop offset="70%" stopColor="rgba(255,122,0,0)" /></radialGradient>       <radialGradient id="g3"><stop offset="0%" stopColor="rgba(251,146,60,0.45)" /><stop offset="70%" stopColor="rgba(251,146,60,0)" /></radialGradient>       <linearGradient id="borderGlow" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">         <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#F97316" />         <stop offset="50%" stopColor="#FF7A00" />         <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#FB923C" />         <animateTransform attributeName="gradientTransform" type="rotate" from="0 0.5 0.5" to="360 0.5 0.5" dur="8s" repeatCount="indefinite" />       </linearGradient>     </defs>     <ellipse cx="160" cy="245" rx="260" ry="165" fill="url(#g1)">       <animate attributeName="cx" values="120;420;120" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite" />       <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.65;1;0.65" dur="6s" repeatCount="indefinite" />     </ellipse>     <ellipse cx="520" cy="245" rx="240" ry="150" fill="url(#g2)">       <animate attributeName="cx" values="560;260;560" dur="11s" repeatCount="indefinite" />       <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.55;0.95;0.55" dur="7s" repeatCount="indefinite" />     </ellipse>     <ellipse cx="760" cy="230" rx="180" ry="135" fill="url(#g3)">       <animate attributeName="rx" values="150;230;150" dur="8s" repeatCount="indefinite" />       <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.5;0.9;0.5" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite" />     </ellipse>     <rect x="1" y="1" width="858" height="258" rx="18" fill="none" stroke="url(#borderGlow)" strokeWidth="1.5" />   </svg>
